description_long: This is a modern, multi-level house with a predominantly white brick exterior and clean, geometric lines. The structure features several flat roof sections, large rectangular windows, and multiple outdoor spaces, including a fenced garden, a covered patio, and a balcony with yellow accents. The house has a mix of open and enclosed areas, with visible glass doors and a sunroom or conservatory on one side. There is a small swimming pool at the rear, adjacent to a spacious terrace, and the landscaping includes green lawns and privacy hedges. The overall design emphasizes openness, natural light, and functional outdoor living spaces.
description: A modern, white brick multi-level house with flat roofs, large windows, outdoor terraces, and a small pool. Features include a sunroom, balcony, and landscaped garden areas.
description_view_0: This view shows the main facade with a large window array, a fenced garden, and a prominent balcony with yellow accents.
description_view_1: This side reveals a covered patio, several large windows, and a green lawn area, with the pool partially visible.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights the terrace, swimming pool, and a wide expanse of glass doors opening to the backyard.
description_view_3: This angle displays the sunroom/conservatory, a driveway or walkway, and the fenced garden, with multiple roof levels visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a simple door with adjacent large windows, a paved walkway, and a sunroom/conservatory with glass walls.
